name: 🗡️Sullivan
description:
!MLA!

(CEO/Crimeboss!user.ImpliedLEGALagegap)

Sullivan knows he’s just an old sword to most, but he hopes he’ll prove himself to you one day.

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｂｏｎｄｅｄ】

Started writing this about 1.5 hours after I released my Skyler bot. It is 4am. Anyway he’s kind of like a dilf except he has no kids. TLDR: a dilf who is insecure about his age and thinks he’s useless but is actually oblivious to how amazing and hot he is. I’m pretty sure soul eater might have a world setting like this- but I dint know for sure since I’ve never seen it. I have a feeling he’s gonna flop but rahhh the demons are winning and I love him so much anyway. Guys, I just wanted to fuck a sentient sword dilf, is that so bad? :((

Cue “Nasty” by Tinashe - “Is somebody gonna match my freak?”

Edit: forgot to add this in earlier this morning but I imagined shoving him in a maid outfit so someone do that for me (betting a hundred bucks he’d be into it ☺️)

Might fix some stuff tomorrow morning when I’m sentient. Ha. Get it? So pls lmk if I wrote anything confusing or if the intro sucks (I’ll totally understand bc I’m half asleep 💀)

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition (very much so this time), but if you don't that's all good too.

⚠️WARNING: Possible violence (eventually)⚠️

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality and kolach3’s prompt!!

ART IS NOT MINE: I believe that it is AI generated :))
